texto: down down↓ bottomRemove this quote from your collection“I thought I saw a memory." The nun looks at her funny as the bus turns into a position she can no longer see Elathan."What do you mean dear?" She turns to the nun."I don't know exactly, I saw a face that looked like a long lost memory trying to push its way back into my head. Something powerful, something good." Michael was right. She had pushed all the memories of her father's death deep into the back of her mind, including Elathan. She shakes it off.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kerri E. Lorenz: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “down down↓ bottomRemove this quote from your collection“I thought I saw a memory." The nun looks …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, passion, memory pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e reflexao.
